english: to free / to liberate / to release
notes: Can also be used reflexively as 'sich befreien' (to free oneself), but the primary form is non-reflexive transitive.

sentences.german: Die Feuerwehr befreit den Mann aus dem brennenden Auto.
sentences.english: The fire brigade frees the man from the burning car.

sentences.german: Die Soldaten haben die Stadt von der Besatzung befreit.
sentences.english: The soldiers have liberated the city from the occupation.

sentences.german: Er hat sich von seiner Angst befreit.
sentences.english: He freed himself from his fear.
